meta.description: Harrata City — French-speaking FiveM Roleplay server: living economy, factions, jobs and realistic urban experience.

betaBanner.title: Free access during beta.
betaBanner.description: Join the whitelist, no purchase required, zero pay-to-win.

hero.title: Harrata City
hero.tagline: The city never sleeps. Your story might.
hero.description: Harrata City — FiveM Roleplay server: living economy, factions, jobs and realistic urban experience.

why.title: Why join us
why.description: Features and content managed from admin: text, Discord / Cfx.re links, Tebex, colors and modules.

features.title: RP Quality
features.description: Coherent scenes, fair-play and responsive staff for lasting immersion.

features.title: Living economy
features.description: Legal & illegal jobs, controlled money flows, RP-minded anti-grind.

features.title: Factions & companies
features.description: Playable structures, documents, territories and narrative events.

features.title: Optimized map
features.description: Performance, clean props, clear RP zones and polished MLOs.

forum.title: Community forum
forum.description: Chat with players: introductions, lore, scene ideas and mutual aid. Open a topic or reply — everything is saved with the site configuration (browser / JSON export).
forum.joinDiscussionDescription: Introductions, lore, help — everyone can participate.

stats.title: Statistics (overview)
stats.description: Example numbers — replace them with your data (API, database) from the site configuration.

presentation.title: One server, one identity, one experience
presentation.subtitle: Lore, philosophy, systems and media: everything that defines your RP world.
presentation.economyBlurb: A circular economy: salaries, stocks, fictional taxes, gray market and real risks. Money has weight here.
presentation.mediaDescription: Images, videos and trailers — manageable from admin.
presentation.mediaEmpty: No media yet. Add some from Admin → Content → Presentation.

lore.title: Los Santos, differently
lore.body: Every street here tells a story of debt, alliance or betrayal. You're not a scoreboard: you're a resident.

lore.title: Philosophy
lore.body: We prioritize narrative, respect for the setting, and slow but meaningful progression. Grinding isn't the protagonist.

rules.title: Gameplay framework & rules
rules.subtitle: The rules that ensure a healthy and fair RP experience for everyone.
